节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the browser policies of the enterprise devices.
Allow the administrator to set the browser policies. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } appId - id of the bundle that need to set policies.
@param { string } policies - browser policies that need to set.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of setPolicies.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
id of the bundle that need to set policies.
browser policies that need to set.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.

节点.功能描述: Allow the administrator to set the browser policies. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } appId - id of the bundle that need to set policies.
@param { string } policies - browser policies that need to set.
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the setPolicies.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
id of the bundle that need to set policies.
browser policies that need to set.

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the setPolicies.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.

节点.功能描述: Allow the administrator to get the browser policies. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } appId - id of the bundle that need to set policies.
@param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - the callback carries the browser policies returned by the getPolicies.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
id of the bundle that need to set policies.
the callback carries the browser policies returned by the getPolicies.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.

注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } appId - id of the bundle that need to set policies.
@returns { Promise<string> } the promise carries the browser policies returned by the getPolicies.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
id of the bundle that need to set policies.

节点.return_description: the promise carries the browser policies returned by the getPolicies.
